'''Dutan Mining Supply Exports''', based in [[Gallisport]], supplied [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporations with equipment and supplies. They were the legitimate front for [[Dutan Lee]]'s weapons-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations.<ref name="AJ9" />
